projects.name: Main Road Repair
projects.description: Repair and resurfacing of the main village road connecting Halasuru to the state highway. Includes drainage improvements and speed breakers.

projects.name: Community Borewell Installation
projects.description: Installation of a 300ft deep borewell with motor pump and overhead tank to provide clean drinking water to 150 households.

projects.name: Gram Panchayat Community Hall
projects.description: Construction of a multi-purpose community hall with capacity for 200 people. Includes stage, seating, restrooms, and kitchen facility.

projects.name: Village Bridge Construction
projects.description: Construction of a reinforced concrete bridge over the seasonal river to ensure year-round connectivity for 5 neighboring villages.

projects.name: Solar Street Lights Installation
projects.description: Installation of 50 solar-powered LED street lights along the main village roads and common areas for improved safety and visibility.

projects.name: Primary School Renovation
projects.description: Renovation of the village primary school including new classrooms, library, computer lab, and playground equipment.
